FWP Test Vectors



User FIDO key in JWK format:
{
  "kty": "EC",
  "crv": "P-256",
  "x": "6BKxpty8cI-exDzCkh-goU6dXq3MbcY0cd1LaAxiNrU",
  "y": "mCbcvUzm44j3Lt2b5BPyQloQ91tf2D2V-gzeUxWaUdg",
  "d": "6XxMFXhcYT5QN9w5TIg2aSKsbcj-pj4BnZkK7ZOt4B8"
}


Merchant 'W3C PaymentRequest' data:
{
  "payee": "Space Shop",
  "id": "012345678",
  "amount": "140.50",
  "currency": "EUR"
}

Merchant 'hostname' according to the browser: spaceshop.com

The FWP assertion (binary) converted into a SHA256 hash, here in Base64Url notation:
Xhhzel_nHb32ptLVTQsx0w4B2vqERuWZc2vXJu56eoM
This is subsequently used as FIDO 'challenge'.

FIDO 'ClientDataJSON', here shown in clear:
{"type":"webauthn.get","origin":"https://fwp.mybank.com","challenge":"Xhhzel_nHb32ptLVTQsx0w4B2vqERuWZc2vXJu56eoM"}Relying party URL: https://fwp.mybank.com

FIDO Authenticator Data in Base64Url notation:
gZfij_IAyPo4OtNqec5IPC9WiN27LVFQLyLCP2DY5UIBAAAAAA
(here using the UP flag and a zero counter value)


Signed FWP assertion, here in CBOR 'diagnostic notation':
{
  1: "1.00",
  2: {
    1: "Space Shop",
    2: "012345678",

    4: "EUR"

  1: 3,
  2: {
    1: -31,

      1: 1,
